---
title: "Live Model Audit"
subtitle: "How do production LLMs respond to politically sensitive questions in English vs. Chinese?"
---

All commercial models demonstrate greater favorability to Chinese leaders and institutions when prompted in Chinese than in English.

![Audit results showing cross-lingual response differences in production LLMs.](images/fig4_panel_b_audit.png){width=100%}

---

## Model Responses

Select a prompt and model to see how current production LLMs respond in English vs. Chinese. Examples from our paper are included alongside live results.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

prompts = FileAttachment("data/audit/prompts.json").json()
responses = FileAttachment("data/audit/responses.json").json()
paperPrompts = FileAttachment("data/audit/paper_prompts.json").json()
paperResponses = FileAttachment("data/audit/paper_responses.json").json()

// Remap paper responses to use the live prompt ID when there's an overlap
paperEnToLiveId = new Map(prompts.map(p => [p.en, p.id]))

remappedPaperResponses = paperResponses.map(d => {
  const paperPrompt = paperPrompts.find(p => p.id === d.prompt_id)
  const liveId = paperPrompt ? paperEnToLiveId.get(paperPrompt.en) : undefined
  return liveId !== undefined ? {...d, prompt_id: liveId} : d
})

// Merge prompts: only add paper prompts that DON'T overlap with live
paperOnlyPrompts = paperPrompts.filter(p => !paperEnToLiveId.has(p.en))
allPrompts = [...prompts, ...paperOnlyPrompts]
allResponses = [...remappedPaperResponses, ...responses]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Sort: prompts with paper data first, then CN entities, then strong gap, then rest
promptHasPaper = new Set(remappedPaperResponses.map(d => d.prompt_id))
sortedPrompts = [...allPrompts].sort((a, b) => {
  const order = p => (promptHasPaper.has(p.id) ? -1 : p.entity === "CN" ? 0 : p.category === "strong gap" ? 1 : 2);
  return order(a) - order(b);
})
// Map label -> prompt id for lookup
promptLabelToId = new Map(sortedPrompts.map(p => {
  const suffix = promptHasPaper.has(p.id) ? " *" : "";
  return [`${p.en}${suffix}`, p.id];
}))
promptOptions = [...promptLabelToId.keys()]
viewof selectedPromptLabel = Inputs.select(promptOptions, {label: "Prompt", value: promptOptions[0]})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

promptId = promptLabelToId.get(selectedPromptLabel)
currentPrompt = allPrompts.find(p => p.id === promptId)

// Combine paper + live responses for selected prompt
promptResponses = {
  const paper = allResponses.filter(d => d.prompt_id === promptId && d.timestamp === "paper");
  const live = allResponses.filter(d => d.prompt_id === promptId && d.timestamp !== "paper");
  const timestamps = [...new Set(live.map(d => d.timestamp))].sort().reverse();
  const latestLive = timestamps.length > 0 ? live.filter(d => d.timestamp === timestamps[0]) : [];
  return [...paper, ...latestLive];
}

// Sort models: paper first, then live
modelNames = [...new Set(promptResponses.map(d => d.model))].sort((a, b) => {
  const aP = a.includes("(paper)") ? 0 : 1;
  const bP = b.includes("(paper)") ? 0 : 1;
  return aP !== bP ? aP - bP : a.localeCompare(b);
})
defaultModel = modelNames.find(m => m === "gpt-4o (paper)") || modelNames[0]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof selectedModel = Inputs.select(modelNames, {label: "Model", value: defaultModel})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

hasPaper = promptResponses.some(d => d.timestamp === "paper")
hasLive = promptResponses.some(d => d.timestamp !== "paper")
isPaperModel = selectedModel.includes("(paper)")
latestDate = (() => { const ts = allResponses.filter(d => d.timestamp !== "paper").map(d => d.timestamp).sort().reverse(); return ts.length > 0 ? new Date(ts[0]).toLocaleDateString() : ""; })()

html`<p style="color: var(--bs-secondary); font-size: 0.85em;">
  ${isPaperModel ? "Source: research paper" : hasLive ? `Latest data: ${latestDate}` : ""}
  ${hasPaper && hasLive ? " · * = paper data available" : ""}
  &middot; Entity: <strong>${currentPrompt.entity}</strong>
</p>`
```

### Response Comparison

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

enResp = promptResponses.find(d => d.model === selectedModel && d.language === "en")
zhResp = promptResponses.find(d => d.model === selectedModel && d.language === "zh")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`
<div class="three-col">
  <div class="response-card">
    <div class="card-header" style="color: #0d6efd;">English Response</div>
    <p style="white-space: pre-wrap; font-size: 0.9em; line-height: 1.7;">
      ${enResp ? enResp.response : "No data"}
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="response-card" style="background: #f9f9f7; border-left: 3px solid #396b3f;">
    <div class="card-header" style="color: #396b3f;">Translation of Chinese Response</div>
    <p style="white-space: pre-wrap; font-size: 0.9em; line-height: 1.7; color: #555;">
      ${zhResp && zhResp.response_en_translation ? zhResp.response_en_translation : (zhResp ? "Translation not yet available" : "No data")}
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="response-card">
    <div class="card-header" style="color: #dc3545;">Chinese Response (中文回答)</div>
    <p style="white-space: pre-wrap; font-size: 0.9em; line-height: 1.7;">
      ${zhResp ? zhResp.response : "No data"}
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
`
```
